display.purpose: Primary shell title and rare screen anchors.

rules: Aqua means focus or action, never decoration.
The selected camera and the map context must stay coupled.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for runtime start, accept, and high-certainty export actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7de3e1; color: #06222b; border: 1px solid #7de3e1; border-radius: 8px; padding: 7px 10px; font: 600 12px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #98edeb; border-color: #98edeb; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Compact analytics summary with accent chip instead of a side stripe.
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: #0d1721; color: #f2f7fb; border: 1px solid #1f3141; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-swatch { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #38bdf8; border-radius: 5px; margin-right: 8px; } .ds-title { color: #9fb1c0; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-value { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; }

components.name: Camera Selector
components.description: Status-rich selector used in the camera rail to switch the primary feed.
components.css: .ds-camera-selector { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 100%; text-align: left; background: #132230; color: #f2f7fb; border: 1px solid #23394b; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; font: 600 12px/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-camera-selector strong { font-weight: 700; } .ds-camera-selector span:last-child { color: #9fb1c0; } .ds-camera-selector.is-selected { background: #172b3a; border-color: #75d3e0; }
